items.name: ShinyHunters
items.targets: Telus Digital (1 petabyte data theft claimed), Salesforce Experience Cloud Sites exploitation
items.ttps: T1190 Exploit Public-Facing Application, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service, T1213 Data from Information Repositories

items.name: Handala Hack (Iran-linked)
items.targets: Stryker medical device manufacturer (200K devices wiped), Raz Zimmt (Israeli security researcher)
items.ttps: T1485 Data Destruction, T1490 Inhibit System Recovery, T1566 Phishing, T1190 Exploit Public-Facing Application (CVE-2019-0604)

items.name: TA453 (Iran-linked)
items.targets: Enterprise VPN users, phishing campaigns leveraging Iran war context
items.ttps: T1566.001 Spearphishing Attachment, T1566.002 Spearphishing Link, T1189 Drive-by Compromise via SEO poisoning

items.name: TA473 (Iran-linked)
items.targets: Various targets with Iran war-themed phishing campaigns
items.ttps: T1566.001 Spearphishing Attachment, T1566.002 Spearphishing Link

items.name: Storm-2561
items.targets: Enterprise VPN users via SEO poisoning and fake VPN clients (SonicWall mentioned)
items.ttps: T1189 Drive-by Compromise, T1608.004 SEO Poisoning, T1554 Compromise Client Software Binary

items.name: Qilin (ransomware)
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1490 Inhibit System Recovery, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service

items.name: LockBit5 (ransomware)
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1490 Inhibit System Recovery, T1491 Defacement

items.name: Akira (ransomware)
items.ttps: T1190 Exploit Public-Facing Application, T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1489 Service Stop

items.name: CL0P/CLOP (ransomware)
items.targets: Reference to $46 million theft from US government
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service, T1213 Data from Information Repositories

items.name: Lazarus Group (North Korea)
items.targets: References in multiple cyber warfare and nation-state attack articles
items.ttps: T1566 Phishing, T1195 Supply Chain Compromise, T1059 Command and Scripting Interpreter

items.name: DarkWebInformer (data broker)
items.targets: Leaked 30M Colombian citizens from ICFES database, Austrian HB Brantner customer data, 26,500 IoT devices in Saudi Arabia
items.ttps: T1213 Data from Information Repositories, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service, T1589 Gather Victim Identity Information

canada_landscape.summary: Russian hackers are actively targeting Canada's governments, businesses, and military according to cyber spy agency warnings. Telus Digital, a major Canadian telecommunications subsidiary, confirmed a massive security incident with ShinyHunters claiming 1 petabyte of data theft. Loblaw suffered a data breach with hackers accessing IT networks and customer information, affecting Canada's largest grocery retailer.
canada_landscape.retailers: Loblaw - data breach with IT network compromise and customer information accessed; Telus Digital - confirmed security incident with 1PB data theft claimed by ShinyHunters
